There's a side trail of the Vulcan main trail, that takes you up close to the big radio antenna, near 19th terrace. It's may be a little difficult to find, but well worth it in the summer time (very bountiful, and delicious!) Access: Private.
Dewberries cover the bushes out in front of the auto dealer. They ripen mid-late spring (April, May) Falling Fruit season: April-June.
Bountiful Fig tree overhanging parking lot of the neighborhood market Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Very large pecan tree. Area looks like it may be slated for development. Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit record for American persimmon.
Persimmons ripen in fall. Be sure not to harvest too early in fall, otherwise they'll give you cottonmouth. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
